nodes.label: agents.py
nodes.rationale: Required file that exposes make_policy to return actions at match time.

nodes.label: MOVE Action
nodes.rationale: Compass direction movement. For GKs, 0 and 1 are lateral along the goal line since engine auto-faces the ball.

nodes.label: DIVE Action
nodes.rationale: GK only. Triggers cooldown. Use sparingly.

nodes.label: DEFLECT Action
nodes.rationale: GK only. Sets deflect angle but does NOT move GK.

nodes.label: Network Architecture
nodes.rationale: No platform-imposed architecture. train_rl_agent.py and agents.py models must simply match each other.

nodes.label: Starter agents.py
nodes.rationale: Loads DQN weights, falls back to heuristic for untrained slots so it always plays a sane game.

nodes.label: torch
nodes.rationale: Pinned to 2.5.1 to match server GPU environment.

nodes.label: tensorflow
nodes.rationale: Runs on CPU on VM to avoid CUDA-wheel clash with torch.
